response.step_by_step_log: The video was analyzed, and the song title "STARTING OVER" was identified from both audio cues (Omaru Polka stating the title) and on-screen text. Web searches for "Omaru Polka STARTING OVER lyrics" confirmed it is an original song by Omaru Polka. The video was then split into a performance scene and a talk/merch announcement scene. Lyrics were retrieved and included in the JSON.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a live performance of Omaru Polka's original song "STARTING OVER", followed by a talk segment where she introduces birthday merchandise with guests Momosuzu Nene, Shishiro Botan, and Yukihana Lamy.

scenes.description: Omaru Polka performs her song "STARTING OVER" on a virtual stage. Lyrics are shown on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
It's finally the true end I'm ready for my destiny
It's finally the true end I'm ready for STARTING OVER
やっと幕を下ろせた
最後の瞬間まで
わたしは精一杯に
わたしをやりきった
終演の続きは
誰も知らなくていい
涙を置いて
いつかに繋がる わたしのはじまり
信じて歩き出そう
再び幕は上がる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It's finally the true end I'm ready for my destiny
It's finally the true end I'm ready for STARTING OVER
I was finally able to let the curtain fall
Until the very last moment
I gave it my all
I finished being myself
The continuation after the finale
Nobody needs to know
Leaving my tears behind
The beginning of me that connects to someday
I'll believe and start walking
The curtain rises once again

scenes.description: Omaru Polka speaks to the audience, announces the song title, and introduces guests to discuss her birthday merchandise.
